title: Address Column
excerpt: The location column in the CRM is nice, but there are significant pit falls. Most of my addresses for clients or companies are suites or PO Boxes, the locations column does not allow me to include those specific details …

posts.author: jc_nu-fam (Josh Carson)
posts.cookedHtml: The location column in the CRM is nice, but there are significant pit falls. Most of my addresses for clients or companies are suites or PO Boxes, the locations column does not allow me to include those specific details in their address. My current work around is creating a text column and hand entering the information, but it could be better.
